results.title: City verifying data for some LLMDs parcels seeking refund
results.description: FAIRFIELD — The city is verifying data for 5,500 parcels with the Solano County Tax Collector and Assessor-Recorder for the lighting, landscape and maintenance districts about ownership changes.

results.title: Multifamily rehabilitation funding available in Fairfield
results.description: FAIRFIELD — The city has about $400,000 in Community Development Block Grant funding to support rehabilitation of existing multifamily rental housing.

results.title: A Toronto one-bedroom condo just sold for $290,000 — is this a new low?
results.description: The unit was a power of sale, with a big loss for the original owner.
